title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, generate completions with local models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama models as LLMs, embedders and chat models.

title: Ollama-WebUI
summary: Self-hosted ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; markdown, code highlighting, model manager.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack component to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, POJO mapping, Android compatible.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app that streams answers from a local Ollama server via the JS client.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets a server chat with local Llama/Mistral models through Ollama.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama’s REST API; built-in Finch pooling and streaming JSON.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with readline history, syntax highlighting & prompt templates.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that adds /ollama slash command to query local models privately in channels or DMs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem wrapping Ollama REST endpoints; supports streaming and embeddings.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package to integrate Ollama models into mobile or desktop apps.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server exposing Ollama as a tool for Claude Desktop & other MCP clients.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds “Ask Ollama” command to summarize or rewrite notes using local models.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official Ollama JavaScript package downloaded 100k+ times; mirrors the github.com/ollama/ollama-js repo.
